Review: There's immense hype for the movie. Some might get disappointed and some might be overwhelmingly happy. Personally, I loved the movie a lot.There's not much scope for the story, much like the Chapter 1. But the movie does the justice to the action sequences, buildup to the heroes, villains and other characters  Yash as Rocky bhai nailed it yet again. Other characters were superb too. Sanjay Dutt, Raveena Tandon, Sreenidhi Shetty, Achyuth Kumar, Prakash Raj and every other character were very good. However, there are two slightly underwhelming aspects. While the background music was very good, the songs weren't upto the expectations. While the hero faces a lot of challenges, it also becomes pretty obvious through the motion of the movie that the hero would be nearly unbeatable. The movie still surprises the audience with its unexpected twists.Overall, it's a very good movie. My suggestion would be not to have any expectations. It's indeed above expectations due to the scale and action. And, one shouldn't definitely miss the post-credits scene.

Well i watched the movie yesterday since i had expected beyond infinity from the movie unfortunately i was not that satisfied. One thing which made me disappointed was that this time rocky’s dark side or unethical portion was quite conspicuous. Some scenes which proved the above point includes, his rude behaviour of testing that machine gun causing great havoc at the police station even having recieved his gold bar with full compliance.It somehow portrayed a negative image of my hero in my mind. Secondly his overemphasis on achieving wealth in the name of her mother’s wish somehow distorted the real meaning of her mother’s dream.

I had my expectations pretty high, but Prashant Neel breached my expectations and the movie was on a whole different level. Yash is a beast,his style, attitude,swag were all on a different level altogether. Technically movie is strong, bhuvan gowda's cinematography was extraordinary, and Ravi Basrur's background music was top notch. I personally liked Raveena Tandon a lot, her dialogue delivery was excellent and had a great screen presence. Sanjay Dutt proved why is the best antagonist in film industry at present.

Right from the starting, the movie sticks you to your seat and forces you to laud for every scene. The promise that was made is kept. Every actor has given their best. Raveena Tandon as Ramika Sen has mesmerized me. Her intent, dialogue delivery, the way she carried herself in the movie is phenomenal. Sanjay Dutt as Adheera is probably the best antagonist against the gigantic rocky. Its better on my behalf if I stay quite about the performance of Yash. My words won't do justice to his performance in the movie.

This movie is an absolute entertainer. Solid performances. None of the actors have been just cast for sake of publicity. The void left by Anantnag has been perfectly filled by Prakash Raj. Background music is ultimate and gives that extra swag to the already swaggy Rocky bhai. Watch it in theatres for the best experience.
Every minute was loaded with high energy, excitement & fun…
This movie is neither too god nor too bad.
